chapter_title.en: Visiting a Believer Socially and When He is Ill

text: 155 - وعن أبي جعفر عليه السلام قال: إن لله عز وجل جنة لا يدخلها إلا ثلاثة: رجل حكم في نفسه بالحق، ورجل زار أخاه المؤمن في البر، ورجل أبر أخاه المؤمن في الله عز وجل.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 155. It has been reported that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said: Allah has a Paradise that none shall enter except three kinds of people: one who judges concerning himself with justice, one who visits his fellow righteous believer and one who does good for his fellow believer for the sake of Allah.
